tools.name: get_installed_vamp_plugins_list
tools.description: Get the list of Vamp plugins (keys and brief descriptions) installed on the system

sampleRate.description: Sample rate to use when querying plugin descriptors (defaults to 48000)

plugins.description: Array of Vamp plugin keys (identifier + feature) and their descriptions

errors.description: Optional list of errors encountered while scanning

tools.name: get_vamp_plugin_descriptions
tools.description: Get full descriptions of specific Vamp plugins by their keys

sampleRate.description: Sample rate to use when querying plugin descriptors (defaults to 48000)

descriptions.description: Map of plugin key strings (identifier:feature) to their full descriptions

errors.description: Optional map of plugin key strings to error messages for plugins that could not be loaded

tools.name: get_document_state
tools.description: Get the current document state with all groups and tracks

deep.description: Include detailed track information (descriptions, parameters, inputs). Defaults to false

groups.description: Array of groups in the document

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the group

tracks.description: Array of tracks in the group

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

parameters.description: Map of parameter identifiers to their current values

input.description: The identifier of the input track (empty string if no input)

type.description: The type of the track (label, value, or vector)

tools.name: get_document_audio_file_layout
tools.description: Get the audio file layout (audio input files and channel assignments) of the current document

layout.description: Array of audio file layouts with file paths and channel numbers. Channel -1 = mono mix, 0 or above = specific channel index

tools.name: set_document_audio_file_layout
tools.description: Set the audio file layout (audio input files and channel assignments) of the current document

layout.description: Array of objects with 'file' (absolute path string) and 'channel' (-1 for mono, 0+ for specific channel)

file.description: Absolute path to the audio file

channel.description: Channel number: -1 = mono mix, 0 or above = specific channel index

tools.name: get_audio_file_info
tools.description: Get audio file information using juce::AudioFormatReader

file.description: Absolute path to the audio file
Absolute path to the audio file

usesFloatingPointData.description: Whether the audio data is floating point

tools.name: get_document_time_zoom
tools.description: Get the current time zoom state with both visible and global ranges

tools.name: get_track_vertical_zoom
tools.description: Get the vertical zoom state of a point or vector track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

tools.name: set_track_vertical_zoom
tools.description: Set the vertical zoom state of a point or vector track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

tools.name: get_group_vertical_zoom
tools.description: Get the vertical zoom state of the group overlay track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the group

tools.name: set_group_vertical_zoom
tools.description: Set the vertical zoom state of the group overlay track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the group

tools.name: get_track_value_range
tools.description: Get the value range of a vector track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

tools.name: set_track_value_range
tools.description: Set the value range of a vector track

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

tools.name: get_time_selection
tools.description: Get the current time selection range

isEmpty.description: True if there is no time selection

tools.name: get_selected_items
tools.description: Get the currently selected groups and tracks in the document

tools.name: get_attached_files
tools.description: Get the list of file paths attached to the current chat query

files.description: Absolute paths of the files attached to the query

tools.name: set_document_time_zoom
tools.description: Set the currently visible time range (zoom viewport)

tools.name: get_group_names
tools.description: Query the names of one or more groups

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the groups

names.description: Map of group identifiers to their names

tools.name: get_group_layouts
tools.description: Query the layouts of one or more groups (list of track identifiers in order - 0 index is top track)

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the groups

layouts.description: Map of group identifiers to their track layout (arrays of track identifiers, 0 index is top track)

tools.name: set_group_names
tools.description: Set the names of one or more groups

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the group

name.description: The new name for this group

groups.description: Array of group identifier and name pairs

tools.name: set_group_layouts
tools.description: Set the layout (track order) of one or more groups

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the group

layout.description: Array of track identifiers in the desired order (0 index is top track)

groups.description: Array of group identifier and layout pairs

tools.name: get_track_types
tools.description: Query the types of one or more tracks (label for markers, value for lines, vector for matrix/spectrogram)

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

types.description: Map of track identifiers to their types (label, value, or vector)

tools.name: get_track_graphics
tools.description: Query the graphics properties of one or more tracks. Properties returned depend on track type: label tracks (all colors except map, font, lineWidth, labelLayout), value tracks (all colors except map, font, lineWidth, unit), vector tracks (colorMap, unit)

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

graphics.description: Map of track identifiers to their graphics settings. Each track may have: colorMap (string - enum, vector only), colorBackground (string - #RRGGBBAA, label/value only), colorForeground (string - #RRGGBBAA, label/value only), colorDuration (string - #RRGGBBAA, label only), colorText (string - #RRGGBBAA, label/value only), colorShadow (string - #RRGGBBAA, label/value only), fontName (string, label/value only), fontSize (float, label/value only)fontStyle (string, label/value only), lineWidth (float, label/value only), unit (string, value/vector only), labelLayoutPosition (float, label only), labelLayoutJustification (string - enum, label only)

tools.name: get_track_names
tools.description: Query the names of one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

names.description: Map of track identifiers to their names

tools.name: get_track_descriptions
tools.description: Query the plugin descriptions of one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

descriptions.description: Map of track identifiers to their plugin descriptions

tools.name: get_track_parameters
tools.description: Query the parameter identifiers and current values of one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

parameters.description: Map of track identifiers to their parameter identifiers and current values

tools.name: get_track_results_raw
tools.description: Export raw track results in CSV format. Important: always use 'get_track_results_summary' method before this method

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

timeRanges.description: Optional time ranges [[startTime, endTime], ...] in seconds; results outside all ranges are excluded

channels.description: Optional channel indices to export; exports all channels when omitted

includeHeader.description: When true, includes a CSV header row for each exported channel

applyExtraThresholds.description: When true, filters frames using the track extra-threshold settings (default 'true')

allowLargeOutput.description: When true, allows exporting more than 20 filtered results. Keep disabled unless strictly necessary

waitSeconds.description: Optional maximum wait time in seconds for results access when analysis is still running (default 0)

content.description: Array of text blocks, one per requested track. Each entry includes a trackId and CSV text in the tool response content

tools.name: get_track_results_summary
tools.description: Compute summary statistics on track results. Returns statistics (count, min, max, median, mean, variance, skewness when possible) for values and extra-values. Important: always use this method before the 'get_track_results_raw' method

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

applyExtraThresholds.description: When true, filters frames using the track extra-threshold settings (default 'true')

channels.description: Optional channel indices to include; all channels are used when omitted

timeRanges.description: Optional time ranges [[startTime, endTime], ...] in seconds; results outside all ranges are excluded

waitSeconds.description: Optional maximum wait time in seconds for results access when analysis is still running (default 0)

stats.description: Array of per-track statistics. Each entry contains a trackId, track type, optional value stats for value tracks, and extraValues stats for all tracks

tools.name: set_track_results_raw
tools.description: Modify the results of a track.

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

results.description: The results in the CSV format. For label track, each row contains time, duration, label, extraValue1, extraValue2, ... (extra values are optional). For value track, each row contains time, value, extraValue1, extraValue2, ... (extra values are optional). For vector track, each row contains time, value1, value2, ..., extraValue1, extraValue2, ... (extra values are optional).

timeRange.description: Optional time range [startTime, endTime] to update; when omitted, updates the full result range

message.description: Human-readable summary of the update operation

tools.name: get_track_inputs
tools.description: Query the input track identifiers of one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

inputs.description: Map of track identifiers to their input track identifiers (empty string if no input)

tools.name: get_track_is_visible_in_group
tools.description: Query the visibility of one or more tracks in their group

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

visibleInGroup.description: Map of track identifiers to their visibleInGroup boolean state

tools.name: get_track_compatible_inputs
tools.description: Query the compatible input tracks for one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

compatibleInputs.description: Map of track identifiers to arrays of compatible input track identifiers

tools.name: get_track_extra_thresholds
tools.description: Query the extra thresholds used to filter results for one or more tracks

identifiers.description: The unique identifiers of the tracks

extraThresholds.description: Map of track identifiers to arrays of numeric threshold values or null for unset thresholds

tools.name: set_track_graphics
tools.description: Set graphics properties for one or more tracks. Available properties depend on track type: label tracks (colorBackground, colorForeground, colorDuration, colorText, colorShadow, fontName, fontSize, fontStyle, lineWidth, labelLayoutPosition, labelLayoutJustification), value tracks (colorBackground, colorForeground, colorText, colorShadow, fontName, fontSize, fontStyle, lineWidth, unit), vector tracks (colorMap, unit). color values must be a hexadecimal color strings #RRGGBBAA (e.g. '#aabbccff') and colorMap values must be one of the following strings: 'Parula', 'Heat', 'Jet', 'Turbo', 'Hot', 'Gray', 'Magma', 'Inferno', 'Plasma', 'Viridis', 'Cividis', or 'Github'. Font style values must be one of the following strings: 'normal', 'bold', 'italic', or 'bold italic'. Label layout justification values must be one of the following strings: 'top', 'centred', or 'bottom'

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

colorMap.description: color map name (vector tracks only, 'Parula', 'Heat', 'Jet', 'Turbo', 'Hot', 'Gray', 'Magma', 'Inferno', 'Plasma', 'Viridis', 'Cividis', or 'Github')

colorBackground.description: Background color as #RRGGBBAA color string (label/value tracks only)

colorForeground.description: Foreground color as #RRGGBBAA color string (label/value tracks only)

colorDuration.description: Duration color as #RRGGBBAA color string (label tracks only)

colorText.description: Text color as #RRGGBBAA color string (label/value tracks only)

colorShadow.description: Shadow color as #RRGGBBAA color string (label/value tracks only)

fontSize.description: Font size in points (label/value tracks only)

lineWidth.description: Line width in pixels (label/value tracks only)

unit.description: Unit string (value/vector tracks only, empty string to clear)

labelLayoutJustification.description: Label layout justification: 'top', 'centred', or 'bottom' (label tracks only)

tracks.description: Array of track identifiers with their graphics properties to modify

tools.name: set_track_names
tools.description: Set the names of one or more tracks (each track can have a different name)

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

name.description: The new name for this track

tracks.description: Array of track identifier and name pairs

tools.name: set_track_parameters
tools.description: Set parameter values for one or more tracks (each track can have different parameters and values)

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

parameter.description: The identifier of the parameter to modify

value.description: The new value for the parameter

tracks.description: Array of track identifier, parameter, and value tuples

tools.name: set_track_inputs
tools.description: Set input track connections for one or more tracks (each track can have a different input)

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

input.description: The identifier of the input track (empty string to disconnect)

tracks.description: Array of track identifier and input track identifier pairs

tools.name: set_track_is_visible_in_group
tools.description: Set the visibility of one or more tracks in their group

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

visibleInGroup.description: Whether this track is visible in its group

tracks.description: Array of track identifier and visibleInGroup state pairs

tools.name: set_track_extra_thresholds
tools.description: Set the extra thresholds used to filter results for one or more tracks

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the track

extraThresholds.description: Array of threshold values matching the plugin extra outputs; use null to leave a threshold unset

tracks.description: Array of track identifier and extraThresholds pairs

tools.name: create_tracks_with_plugins
tools.description: Create tracks from Vamp plugins

groupIdentifier.description: Optional group identifier; defaults to the first group

position.description: Optional insertion position within the group (0-based). Defaults to append.

tracks.description: Tracks to create with associated plugin keys

tools.name: create_tracks_with_files
tools.description: Create tracks from analysis/result files

file.description: Absolute path to the analysis/result file to import as a track

groupIdentifier.description: Optional group identifier; defaults to the first group

position.description: Optional insertion position within the group (0-based). Defaults to append.

tracks.description: Tracks to create from associated files

tools.name: remove_tracks
tools.description: Remove one or more tracks

tools.name: create_groups
tools.description: Create one or more new groups

name.description: Optional name for the new group

position.description: Optional insertion position (0-based). Defaults to append.

groups.description: Groups to create with their optional names and positions

tools.name: remove_groups
tools.description: Remove one or more groups
